DictionaryItem.title: DictionaryItem
DictionaryItem.description: A logistics catalog product/SKU with pallet/bag requirements

sku.description: The unique stock keeping unit code

name.description: The name of the catalog product

qty_per_pallet.description: Quantity of standard packs per pallet

requires_bag.description: Whether a standard big bag (bela) is required

requires_pallet.description: Whether a wooden pallet is required

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: A customer profile tracking balance, credit status and unreturned items

balance.description: Financial balance (positive is credit, negative is debt)

unreturned_pallets.description: Count of wooden pallets currently owed by the customer

unreturned_bags.description: Count of big bags (belot) currently owed by the customer

Order.title: Order
Order.description: A logistics or delivery order with pallet/bag compliance and approval statuses

status.description: Current workflow state (ממתין, בטיפול, בדרך, נמסר, מבוטל)

rejection_reason.description: Explanation if order is rejected or flag-blocked

dictionary.description: Logistic stock catalog items and their handling details

customers.description: Client accounts and active asset balances

orders.description: Operational delivery orders and logistics status
